title: METRIDIUM
lede: Research-driven development — realigning technological and social systems with the realities of the living world.
scope: Metridium exists to empower individuals through systems and environments designed around the fundamentals of the human condition — enabling richer, more honest relational existence.
We build to empower individuals — creating systems and environments that improve how people relate to themselves and the world, grounded in human realities and built for good.
Tools and environments for human flourishing — built around who we really are.
Redesigning the interface between human systems and living systems — so that what we build actually serves who we are.
Not a single product or industry — a commitment to building infrastructure that respects the full complexity of human and ecological life.
